other_observers: Lisa Edwards, Kara Lewantowicz, Bill Maynard.; I found the bird, and yelled to Lisa, she looked at it, and then went to find Kara and Bill, who also came to look at it.
description: A flycatcher, with bright red, head, chin, throat, breast, belly, undertail coverts. Brownish eye line. Browish back and tail. All black bill and black legs, and dark eyes.Behaviors: I was looking in the russian olives and noticed a male Vermilion Flycatcher. The bird flew around the russian olives and nearby power lines and fence posts.Call: nonePlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: Brandon Percival, Brandon Percival, Brandon Percival, Brandon Percival
